drug_name.description: The name of the drug being evaluated

drug_category.description: The therapeutic class or drug category

covered_indications.description: List of approved medical indications for coverage

step_therapy_requirements.description: Step therapy or prerequisite drug requirements before approval

site_of_care_restrictions.description: Restrictions on where the drug can be administered (e.g. physician office vs hospital)

dosing_limits.description: Maximum dosing, frequency, or quantity limits allowed

effective_dates.description: Policy effective dates and review cycles
